applicability_notes: In-place elementwise less-than. Fusable as an eltwise binary compute op; destination aliases first input, so fusion must respect the write-back to input_tensor_a. Second operand may be a tensor of the same shape or a scalar.; constraints: {'in_place': True, 'broadcasting': 'scalar second operand supported (tested with float scalars)', 'output_semantics': 'boolean-valued (0/1) result written into input_tensor_a; compared with compare_equal (exact match) in tests', 'shapes': 'input_shapes identical for tensor-tensor variant in tests'}
